ac_items.text: GET /api/dashboard/status returns status for all countries
Response filtered by allowed_countries for scoped users
Audit trail entry created with action OPCO_TOGGLE
ON/OFF toggle switch in last column
OpCo user sees only their country

items.reason: No data pipeline — mock status until Warsaw integration

ctx_summary: MUST guidelines (8):
G-001 [backend]: Firestore is the ONLY transactional store
G-002 [backend]: BigQuery is the analytical store
G-004 [general]: FastAPI backend, Next.js frontend
G-005 [backend]: Modular monolith architecture
G-006 [general]: Code lives in ITRP directory
G-007 [backend]: Audit trail is immutable
G-008 [backend]: RBAC enforced server-side
G-009 [backend]: Customer code in my_customers directory
Available scopes: backend, general
Knowledge objects (1):
K-001: Current Implementation Status (21 March 2026) [backend, frontend]
Active objectives (12):
O-001: Firestore Schema & Complete Seed Data (2 KRs) [backend]
O-002: Master Data Structures (without Warsaw) (2 KRs) [backend]
O-003: Config & Settings (API + Frontend) (2 KRs) [backend, frontend]
O-004: RBAC & Auth Completeness (2 KRs) [backend]
O-005: Dashboard Page (Frontend + Status API) (2 KRs) [backend, frontend]
O-006: ITRP Main Page (Summary + Manual Buy) (2 KRs) [backend, frontend]
O-007: Buying Service Core (Eligibility + Auto-Buy) (2 KRs) [backend]
O-008: Maintenance Page (Load Data + Backup/Restore) (2 KRs) [backend, frontend]
O-009: Reporting (APIs + Frontend) (2 KRs) [backend, frontend]
O-010: Notification Service (Emails) (1 KRs) [backend]
O-011: Advanced Features (Queue, Credit Limits, Priority) (3 KRs) [backend, frontend]
O-012: Audit Trail Completeness (2 KRs) [backend]

ac_items.text: ITRP section shows 3 sub-tabs: Summary, Settings, Maintenance
Clicking each navigates to correct route
Country Info panel visible on ITRP page
Shows Legal, Economic, Insurance rows with status chips
Expanded shows Economic, Legal, Insurance sub-rows with amounts
Data grid has alternating row colors
Queue button visible with placeholder action
Each shows report rows with date and week
